summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Enhancements srl Italian cosmetics distribution website. All core features tested including homepage, navigation, language switcher, brand pages, services, contact form integration, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with correct Italian hero title 'Distributore italiano di cosmetici d'eccellenza'
All navigation links working (Home, Chi Siamo, Brand, Servizi, Contatti)
Language switcher IT/EN changes content correctly
About page accessible and loads properly
Brands page shows Trind and Ingrid sections with detailed descriptions
Services page displays all 6 service cards (Distribuzione B2B, Supporto Vendite, Consulenza Professionale, Logistica Affidabile, Formazione, Supporto Marketing)
Contact form validation works for required fields
Contact form submission to /api/contact endpoint successful with success message
Contact info displays correctly (address, phone +39 350 133 9513, email info@enhancements.it, hours)
Google Maps link opens in new tab with correct coordinates
Footer and company branding consistent throughout
Mobile responsive design with hamburger menu and proper form scaling
Backend API health check returns 200 status
Backend API contact endpoint handles validation correctly
Backend API contact form submission stores data successfully
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (9/9 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (15/15 core features working)
